input.testCaseTitle: Incorrect email notifications and missing post approval user in Change SKU workflow
input.stepLabel: Reproduce CPI-404 reported defect: Incorrect email notifications and missing post approval user in Change SKU workflow
input.errorMessage: *Environment: Production* * Workflow: Change SKU * Notification: Email Trigger *Steps to Reproduce:* # SKU belongs to *Bonded Retail > Super Abrasive Retail*. # Product Developer approves the SKU and sends it to *Product Manager*. # Observe the email notification and in-app notification. *Expected Result:* * Email should be sent only to the correct *Product Manager (Retail)*. * Mail body should correctly display the *post approval user (Product Head)*. * Notification should open the correct…
